name: Vegetable Confetti Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 large Carrots; peeled and cut into 1/3-in dice
2 large Fennel bulbs; trimmed and cut into 1/3-in dice
1 large Red pepper; cut into 1/3-in dice
Grated imported Parmesan cheese for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 6-quart pot.
2. Add onions and cook until soft, about 5 minutes, stirring often.
3. Add carrots, fennel, stock, tarragon, thyme. Bring to boil.
4. Simmer, covered, until vegetables are tender, approximately 20 minutes.
5. Add red pepper, zucchini, and mushrooms. Cook, covered, for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Refrigerate up to 4 days or freeze up to 3 months.
8. Serve hot, garnished with Parmesan cheese. Makes 14 cups.
